ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL( UAE_Resident__c , "Yes"), OR( ISBLANK( Emirates_No__pc ), ISBLANK( Passport_Issue_Date__pc ), ISBLANK( Passport_Expiry_Date__pc ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: For UAE Residents, Emirates ID, Passport Issue Date, and Passport Expiry Date are mandatory.
